data.title: NBA Player Stephen Curry Joins Michelle Obama To Introduce Health-Focused Sports Drink
data.description: NBA player Stephen Curry and former First Lady Michelle Obama have launched Plezi Hydration, a sports drink with a health-conscious twist.

data.title: Robinhood Says Its 'Cortex' AI Investment Tool Will 'Bridge The Gap' Between Institutional And Retail Investors: Here Is What It Can And Can't Do
data.description: Robinhood Markets Inc. has launched Robinhood Cortex on Wednesday, with early access granted to Gold members, an AI-powered investment tool designed to offer real-time analysis, trade suggestions, and market insights.

data.title: Mark Cuban Vows To Revamp US Healthcare By Empowering Independent Pharmacies: 'We Don't Want To See Pharmacy Deserts.
data.description: Billionaire investor and entrepreneur Mark Cuban is taking strides to overhaul the U.S. healthcare sector, beginning with his venture, Cost Plus Drugs.

data.title: What Would Warren Buffett Do? As Markets Inches Away From The 'Extreme Fear' Zone, Is It Finally Time To Be Greedy?
data.description: As US markets call curtains on the fourth consecutive week of chaos and turmoil, market participants are increasingly turning fearful.

data.title: Rocket Lab Joins US Space Force's $5.6 Billion Launch Program; Stock Soars
data.description: Rocket Lab USA secures eligibility for the U.S. Space Force's NSSL Phase 3 Lane 1, a $5.6 billion initiative. The company plans to deploy its Neutron rocket, a reusable medium-lift vehicle, for critical national security launches. With 63 Electron missions completed, Rocket Lab strengthens its position as a key player in the defense and space industry.
